title: calophyllum rigidum
intro: Calophyllum rigidum, also known as the rigid mahogany or red beech, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum rigidum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and extracts, are often used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
